allow: Bash(bash .specify/extensions/git/scripts/bash/create-new-feature.sh --json --short-name "ecs-investigation-agent" "Build a production investigation agent for AWS ECS services")

Bash(bash .specify/extensions/git/scripts/bash/create-new-feature.sh --json --short-name "aurora-db-query-tool" "aurora postgresql db tool which enables querying the db of the concrete service under investigation so that the agent can correlate the logs with the data itself in that particular environment")
Bash(.specify/extensions/git/scripts/bash/create-new-feature.sh --json --short-name "git-code-retrieval" "add git repository code retrieval tool to correlate deployed version with source code")
